description: Score cells for one or more gene signatures with sc.tl.score_genes (adds one obs column per signature, <name>_score) and/or the built-in cell-cycle phase scoring. Writes UMAPs colored by each score.
rules: GENE_SETS is a JSON file {name: [genes]}; genes absent from the data are skipped
read-only inputs — writes a new scored.h5ad + score UMAPs under record_store
CELL_CYCLE adds S_score, G2M_score, and phase using Tirosh 2016 human genes
usage: Set INPUT and one of GENE_SETS (JSON) or CELL_CYCLE=1. Optional: NO_PLOTS=1. Output: scored.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder scored.h5ad and still passes.
